violations.text: The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Per PIC, menus are going to be re-printed next week with allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by pots and pans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. PIC called for service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

ROP salmon was observed thawing with the ROP packaging still intact. Salmon was observed at 37 DF and completely taken out of package at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The presence of flys is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate fly problem. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food parsley with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of brown and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC called for service at the time of inspection, dishwasher will be used until serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

(Glass cleaner) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

At the time of inspection, ROP salmon was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed to be over 38 degrees Fahrenheit, PIC voluntarily disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
